On Foot

Built for
the long shift.

12-hour shifts or recovery runs — the recycled EVA absorbs what your day dishes out.

What Goes In Comes Back

WHAT
GOES IN
COMES BACK.

You drop off worn sneakers. We extract the EVA foam. Okabashi molds it in Georgia. You slide on what you sent in. Every colorful speckle is ground-up EVA from a real worn sneaker midsole.

Pre-Order Now →
How It Works

THE LOOP
CLOSES.

01👟
You Drop Off Worn Sneakers
3,000+ Sneaker Impact drop points. Any brand.
02⚙️
We Extract the EVA
Midsoles cleaned and ground. Those speckles? Your old Nikes.
03🏭
Molded in Georgia
Recycled EVA + 40 yrs Okabashi formula. 100% USA-made.
04🔄
Worn → Returned → Repeated
Return them. They become the next pair. No landfill.
YOU CAN
SEE THE
SNEAKERS.

Every fleck is ground-up EVA from a worn sneaker midsole. No other slide shows you this.

🇺🇸 MADE IN USA
Buford, Georgia · Est. 1984
Manufacturing Partner

MADE IN
AMERICA.
NO ASTERISK.

Okabashi has made footwear in Buford, Georgia for over 40 years. Every SURQEL is molded, assembled, and QC'd in one building. The proof is stamped into every sole.
